questions.prompt: Where did you eat after rehearsal?
questions.answer: The bistro that Hector recommended closes at nine.

questions.prompt: I haven't met your study group yet.
questions.answer: When does Margot host the next study session?

questions.prompt: Are you still working on the group slides?
questions.answer: Emma has finished editing the slides for our presentation.

questions.prompt: Have you settled on a roommate yet?
questions.answer: Julian no longer plans to live off campus.

questions.prompt: Tell me how the tutoring session went today.
questions.answer: Matthew asked how my reading speed had improved.

questions.prompt: What did your career counselor say about internships?
questions.answer: Alison wanted to know whether the deadline had been formally extended.

questions.prompt: Did you hear what happened in the chemistry lab?
questions.answer: The shattered beakers were carefully replaced by Juan over the weekend.
